creator: edwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
I get this:

===>  Building for crafty-20.14
gmake target=FreeBSD \
                CC=gcc CXX='cc' \
                CFLAGS+='-fomit-frame-pointer -mtune=i486 -O3 -Wall' \
                CXFLAGS+=-O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe  \
                LDFLAGS=' -lstdc++' \
                opt='-DHASHSTATS -DTRACE -DBOOKDIR=\"/usr/local/lib/crafty\"  -D
LOGDIR=\"/tmp\"  -DRCDIR=\"~/\"  -DTBDIR=\"/usr/local/lib/crafty/TB\" -DINLINE32
' \
                crafty-make
# GNU Make 3.81
# Copyright (C) 2006  Free Software Foundation, Inc.
# This is free software; see the source for copying conditions.
# There is NO warranty; not even for MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A
# PARTICULAR PURPOSE.

# This program built for i386-portbld-freebsd6.2
# gmake[1]: Entering directory `/var/ports/root/cvs/ports/games/crafty/work/craf
ty-20.14'
gmake[1]: no-strict-aliasing: No such file or directory
gmake[1]: *** No rule to make target `no-strict-aliasing'.  Stop.

Any ideas how to resolve it?
